!cs-detection-search query=".exe"

14. Get detection details (Deprecated)

Fetches details of a CrowdStrike Detection using the detection ID.
Base Command
cs-detection-details

!cs-detection-search query=".exe"
Human Readable Output
14. Get detection details (Deprecated)
Deprecated. Use the cs-falcon-search-detection command from the CrowdStrike Falcon integration instead.
Fetches details of a CrowdStrike Detection using the detection ID.
Base Command
cs-detection-details

Command Example
!cs-detection-details detectionID=${CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.detectionID}

name: cs-detection-details

outputs.description: cid of the detection CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.detection_id ID of the detection
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.cid

outputs.description: First behavior of the detection CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.last_behavior Last behavior of the detection
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.first_behavior

outputs.description: Max confidence of the detection CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.max_severity Max severity of the detection
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.max_confidence

outputs.description: Displayname of the max severity CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.alleged_file_type Alleged filetype of the behavior
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.max_severity_display_name

outputs.description: ID of the behavior CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.device_id ID of the device of the behavior
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.behavior_id

outputs.description: ID of the user of the behavior CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.control_graph_id ID of the control graph of the behavior
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.user_id

outputs.description: Commandline of the behavior CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.confidence Confidence of the behavior
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.cmdline

outputs.description: Severity of the behavior CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.filename Filename of the behavior
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.severity

outputs.description: IOC description of the behavior CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.ioc_source IOC source of the behavior
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.ioc_description

outputs.description: IOC type of the behavior CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.ioc_value IOC value of the behavior
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.ioc_type

outputs.description: MD5 of the behavior CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.sha256 SHA256 of the behavior
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.md5

outputs.description: Timestamp of the behavior CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.parent_details.parent_cmdline Commandline of the parent of the behavior
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.timestamp

outputs.description: MD5 of the parent of the behavior CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.parent_details.parent_sha256 SHA256 of the parent of the behavior
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.parent_details.parent_md5

outputs.description: Control graph ID of the parent of the behavior CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.device.agent_version Agent version of the device
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.behaviors.parent_details.parent_control_graph_id

outputs.description: Bios version of the device CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.device.os_version OS version of the device
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.device.bios_version

outputs.description: MACAddress of the device CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.device.local_ip Local IP of the device
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.device.mac_address

outputs.description: External IP of the device CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.device.hostname Hostname of the device
outputs.name: CrowdStrikeHost.Detections.device.external_ip
